final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic movie poster for "大话西游" reimagined in 1990s Hong Kong film style.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography with visible grain and texture, 1990s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic reminiscent of Wong Kar-wai and Jeffrey Lau romantic epics
Composition: wide cinematic framing, eye-level medium shot of embracing couple in foreground with two distant figures on the ancient city wall, shallow depth of field on the lovers
Subject: Zhi Zunbao (至尊宝) and Zixia (紫霞) in an intimate embrace and kiss, period costumes with flowing fabrics, emotional expressions
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese city wall battlements at golden hour, vast sky with warm clouds, two small silhouettes (Bull Demon King and Tang Monk) standing apart in the distant background
Lighting/mood: warm golden hour side-lighting, soft romantic glow, nostalgic and bittersweet atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and gold tones dominating, subtle teal shadows, desaturated reds in costumes, film grain texture throughout
Materials/textures: visible 35mm film grain, slight halation on highlights, matte paper poster texture
Text (verbatim): "大话西游"
Avoid: modern digital polish, oversaturated colors, clean skin retouching, Chinese fantasy game aesthetic, Behance generic style, 8K stuffer terminology
